label: Transparent seahorse motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a seahorse, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A graceful seahorse in side profile with golden ochre body color, curled tail, delicate ridges, pale shell highlights, seagrass green reflected shadows, lagoon aqua accents, and accurate marine anatomy.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the snout, fins, curled tail, or body.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves ridge detail, delicate silhouette, and warm underwater color.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no seagrass background, no ocean scene, no decorative background, no second subject.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Seahorse" derived from the visible transparent seahorse cutout.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the golden ochre body, pale shell highlights, seagrass green reflections, lagoon aqua accents, delicate ridges, curled tail, and side-profile silhouette in the visible cutout. The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme, so token roles and component examples must be clear and readable.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide when available. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Seahorse, Seahorse, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics. Show multilingual product UI guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, aqua-mist surfaces, curled-tail dividers, fine ridge texture, delicate profile-system mood.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: aqua mist, golden ochre, seagrass green, lagoon aqua, ridge amber, pale shell, soft grass, deep meadow, meadow ink.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Seahorse".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Seahorse design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent seahorse cutout and the visible light-mode Morphous Seahorse board as references. Preserve the golden ochre, seagrass green, aqua, and ridge palette roles, delicate component language, curled profile dividers, meadow spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme, so dark-mode token roles and component states must be clear.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide when available. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Seahorse, Seahorse, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from meadow ink and deep meadow, light text from aqua mist, primary accents from golden ochre, secondary accents from seagrass green, lagoon aqua focus and chart details, restrained contrast, subtle ridge and seagrass overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple/blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Seahorse".
